_deploy: Bump latest + appVersion here, BUNDLED_* in surveillance-travel-calculator.html, activeCacheName in service-worker.js — every deploy.
highlights: Calculator tab is now included in the tab policy — it can be enabled or disabled from tab-policy.json like any other tab.

v236.intro: Build v236 — Calculator tab now part of tab policy.

sections.heading: Tab Policy
items: Added 'calculator' to tab-policy.json (and all matching BUNDLED_TAB_POLICY / coerceTabPolicyMap / setPolicy locations) so it can be toggled on or off remotely like the other tabs.
Calculator defaults to true and is treated as a fallback tab when a disabled tab is active, so it cannot be accidentally locked out.
Deploy tab-policy.json, surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, assets/voice-recorder.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v236).

v235.intro: Build v235 — Covert Mode status-bar fix.

sections.heading: Voice Recorder
items: Fixed the thin white (light theme) / dark-grey (dark theme) line at the top of the screen in Covert Mode. The PWA status-bar colour now goes black with the rest of the screen, matching the covert camera.
Leaving the Recorder tab while a background recording continues no longer leaves a black status bar on other tabs.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, assets/voice-recorder.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v235).

sections.heading: App
items: Moved to version 4.0.0 to mark the Voice Recorder release and recent polish.
Added the version footer (Beta · Toolbox · version · build) to the bottom of the Settings menu.
Added spacing above the version footer in the Recorder tab so it no longer sits against the card border.
Deploy index.html, surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, assets/voice-recorder.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v234).

v233.intro: Build v233 — Recorder haptics, waveform, and pickup fixes.

sections.heading: Voice Recorder
items: Haptic feedback is now per-tab. The Recorder's toggle overrides the global haptic setting, so turning it off keeps the Recorder fully silent even when global haptics are on.
Recorder haptics are now OFF by default (the covert camera stays ON by default).
The waveform now only animates while actually recording — on the Ready screen and while paused it sits as a flat idle line, so it no longer looks like it's capturing when it isn't.

Improved pickup of distant/quiet voices: auto gain now stays on in both modes to lift across-the-room sound. For someone 5-7 ft away, also turn Voice clarity OFF so noise suppression doesn't gate out the faint audio.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, assets/voice-recorder.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v233).

v232.intro: Build v232 — version footer on every tab.

sections.heading: App
items: Added the version footer (Beta · Toolbox · version · build) to the bottom of every tab — Calculator, Hotels, Camera, and Recorder — so the build is visible everywhere. It updates automatically with each release.
Updated the footer wording to the Beta channel and short Toolbox name.
Install page (index.html) now lists the Voice Recorder feature and shows the current version and build in its footer.
Deploy index.html, surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, assets/voice-recorder.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v232).

v231.intro: Build v231 — Voice Recorder fixes + Covert Mode.

sections.heading: Voice Recorder
items: Higher audio quality: raised the bitrates and request 48 kHz. For a speaker, music, or across-the-room audio, turn Voice clarity OFF and pick High quality — clarity is for close-up speech and can thin out distant sound.
The Ready timer now resets to 00:00 after each recording instead of holding the last time.
Replaced the level bar with a live animated waveform on the record screen.
Renamed 'Stealth' to 'Covert Mode' everywhere, and the black Covert Mode screen now goes true-fullscreen so the phone status bar and nav bar are hidden, matching the covert camera.
Matched the Covert Mode status text size to the camera, and fixed the Quality dropdown so it opens cleanly instead of inside the card border.
Fixed the Clip Library layout so cards and text no longer run off the right edge. Default max clip length is No limit.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, assets/voice-recorder.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json, tab-policy.json (v231).

v230.intro: Build v230 — new Voice Recorder tab.

sections.heading: Voice Recorder
items: Added a Voice Recorder tab (replacing the placeholder Requests tab): record clear audio in the field, then play, download, or delete clips from the Clip Library.
Voice clarity (noise reduction, echo cancellation, auto gain) is on by default for speech; turn it off in Recorder Settings for raw room audio. Quality and max-clip length are adjustable.
Pause/resume one clip, and a stealth black-screen mode: triple-tap to start/stop, single-tap to confirm it is still recording, swipe up to bring the controls back.

Built to the covert camera's standard: clips are flushed to storage while recording (low memory), survive a crash, auto-stop on critically low battery/storage, and each download includes a .txt with time and GPS. App Lock never interrupts an active recording.
Recorder Settings live in the same tab and under Settings → Recorder, with a How to Use guide — the same layout as the camera.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, assets/voice-recorder.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json, tab-policy.json (v230).

sections.heading: Developer
items: Reorganized Developer Tools into clear cards with a deploy-readiness pill at the top (green = safe, red = mismatch).
Added a live Version sync card that fetches release-notes.json and service-worker.js and flags when their build numbers do not match — the usual "forgot to re-upload a file" deploy slip.
Added a one-tap "Copy deploy block" button and a "Refresh all" button, and expanded the This device card (platform, screen, connection, storage usage, persistent storage, app-lock state).
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v229).

v228.intro: Build v228 — App Lock keypad spacing + haptics.

sections.heading: Security
items: Loosened the App Lock keypad spacing so the keys are less tight, and added a light haptic tap when you press a key.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v228).

v227.intro: Build v227 — App Lock recovery screen + keypad polish.

sections.heading: Security
items: Fixed the recovery-code screen: the keypad no longer appears there, so it is clear you just save the code and tap the new "I saved it — done" button (now a proper large button, not a tiny link).
Made the PIN keypad smaller and more refined, and stopped the title from being clipped by the status bar on tall screens.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v227).

v226.intro: Build v226 — App Lock auto-lock dropdown.

sections.heading: Security
items: Changed the App Lock "Auto-lock after" picker from cramped buttons to the app's standard dropdown so the options no longer get clipped.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v226).

v225.intro: Build v225 — optional App Lock (PIN + biometric).

sections.heading: Security
items: Added an optional App Lock in Settings → App Lock: set a PIN to require it every time the app opens. It is off by default and works completely offline — no account, no texts, no email.
Optional biometric (fingerprint/face) unlock with the PIN as fallback, plus an adjustable auto-lock timer (immediately, 1, 2, or 5 minutes).
The PIN is stored hashed (PBKDF2), never in plain text. A recovery code is shown at setup so a forgotten PIN can be reset without losing your recordings.
The lock never interrupts an active recording, and it does not touch tabs, the update flow, or your saved clips.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v225).

sections.heading: Recording Engine
items: Continuous ("Never") and 1 hr+ recordings no longer hold the whole clip in RAM — each ~1s chunk is released from memory once it's safely written to disk, and the final clip is rebuilt from the on-disk chunk store on stop.
Memory now stays flat regardless of recording length, removing the crash risk on multi-hour sessions. Short clips, stop behaviour, file output, and crash recovery are unchanged.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v224).

v223.intro: Build v223 — Camera Settings copy trimmed.

sections.heading: Camera Settings
items: Shortened the Camera Settings intro blurb and the airplane, timestamp, format, and storage lines.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v223).

Software Update fix from v220 kept (Settings no longer hidden during covert).

sections.heading: Covert Camera

Allow camera access now stays non-fullscreen; fullscreen (and black backdrop) only after permission is granted.
Removed the top edge-cap layer; covert black layers bleed slightly past edges. Swipe-up unchanged.

sections.heading: Covert Camera

Locks the browser viewport offset during covert mode and adds a small body-level black cap at the top edge.
Hides hub UI under the overlay with display:none (restored when you exit covert).

Covert mode now uses a full-screen black backdrop and hides the hub layer under the overlay without breaking double swipe-up to Clip Library.

v211.intro: Build v211 — covert black screen grey line fix.

sections.heading: Covert Camera
items: Fixed a thin grey line near the top of the black screen and permission gate — caused by the status bar gradient showing even when empty, plus a occasional camera preview edge leak.
Recording / Stopped text still readable via text shadow only (no top gradient bar).

v210.intro: Build v210 — Clip library rescue after update.

sections.heading: Covert Camera
items: Clip Library now rescues clips left in a “recording” state after a force-close or update — they should reappear if the video data is still on the device.
Empty library explains when storage was cleared (reinstall / clear site data) vs a normal update.
Camera Settings notes: Software Update does not delete clips; reinstalling or clearing Chrome storage does.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v210).

v209.intro: Build v209 — Software Update stuck UI fix.

sections.heading: Software Update
items: Opening Software Update no longer leaves the button stuck on “Updating…” from a background download you never started.
Stalled downloads recover to Up to date, Update ready, or Retry instead of hanging forever.
Update Now failures reset the button so you can try again.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v209).

v208.intro: Build v208 — MP4-first camera recording on Android.

sections.heading: Covert Camera
items: Recording tries MP4 (H.264) first on up-to-date Chrome (126+), then falls back to WebM if the device cannot record MP4.
Camera Settings shows which format this phone will use (MP4 vs WebM) before and after you record.
Still video-only, 720p, and tuned bitrate for smaller files.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v208).

sections.heading: Covert Camera
items: All recordings are video-only: no microphone permission prompts for recording, no audio tracks on clips, and no Opus audio in the file format.
Permission help and How To Use text now refer to Camera only (not microphone).
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v207).

v206.intro: Build v206 — smaller camera clip file sizes.

sections.heading: Covert Camera
items: Reduced clip file size: records at 720p (1280×720) instead of pushing 1080p, with bitrate capped around 2 Mbps for 720p (was often ~4–7+ Mbps). A ~9 second clip should land near ~2 MB instead of ~5 MB.
Video-only recording (no automatic microphone track) so clips stay smaller and more discreet.
VP9 video-only WebM when the browser supports it — efficient codec without bundled audio.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v206).

v205.intro: Build v205 — Max clip length dropdown fix.

sections.heading: Camera Settings
items: Fixed the Max clip length dropdown for real this time. It sits alone in a short settings card, and that card was clipping the open dropdown so the options were cut off and unselectable. Dropdown-containing cards no longer clip their panel, so all the options show and can be picked.

sections.heading: Install page

v203.intro: Build v203 — Refreshed install landing page.

sections.heading: Install page
items: Redesigned the install / landing page (index.html) with a more polished, professional layout: a refined hero, a 'what's inside' overview (Travel Calculator, Hotel Finder, Covert Camera), and a cleaner install card with QR code and trust badges. Same brand colours; device detection and the install / open buttons work exactly as before.
Deploy index.html alongside the usual files this build.

v201.intro: Build v201 — Clearer clip export: "Download to device".

sections.heading: Covert Camera
items: The "Upload clips to OneDrive" / "Send to OneDrive" buttons are now labelled "Download to device" — that's what they actually do. Clips are stored privately inside Toolbox (deliberately not in your gallery, so they stay covert); Download to device copies them out to your phone's Files/Share sheet, or your computer's Downloads folder.
Exporting now works while offline / in Airplane mode (it's a local copy, not a cloud upload), so you no longer get an "offline" message when trying to pull clips off the device.
Wording across Camera Settings and How To Use updated to say download/export instead of upload.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v201).

v200.intro: Build v200 — Camera Settings dropdown fix and tidier permission help.

sections.heading: Camera Settings
items: Fixed the Size and Max clip length dropdowns — being near the bottom of the page, their options were opening off-screen and getting clipped. Dropdowns now flip open upward automatically when there isn't room below, so every option is selectable.
Removed the "Camera permission help" button from Camera Settings. The same instructions now live on the How To Use page under a new "Camera permission" section.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v200).

v199.intro: Build v199 — Camera permission buttons readable in light theme.

sections.heading: Covert Camera
items: Fixed the "Allow camera access" and "Close" button text being hard to read in the light theme — they were picking up the theme's dark text colour on the black screen. Their text is now always light, so they read clearly in both light and dark themes.

The "Allow camera access" and "Close" button text on the black screen is now lighter and easier to read.

sections.heading: Camera Settings

v196.intro: Build v196 — Camera tab moved to the front; tidier on-screen recording status.

sections.heading: Layout
items: The Camera tab is now the first icon in the bottom tab bar, and the Calculator tab is now the last. Nothing else about the tabs changed — Calculator is still the tab that opens on launch (you can change the launch tab under Settings → Personalization).

sections.heading: Covert Camera
items: The "● Recording" and "Stopped" status text now automatically clears after about 5 seconds instead of staying on screen.
Reminder: tap vibration only works on Android — iPhone/iOS does not expose a vibration API to web apps — and it requires Settings → Personalization → Haptic feedback to be ON.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v196).

v195.intro: Build v195 — Covert Camera: reliable recording, stronger haptics, 12-hour timestamp default.

sections.heading: Covert Camera
items: Fixed the big one: a duplicated tap could stop a recording the instant it started, producing an empty clip that was discarded — which is why some recordings showed "Stopped" immediately and never appeared in the Clip Library. A stop is now ignored if it lands within 1.2s of starting, so triple-tap reliably records and saves.
A failed crash-backup write can no longer stop a live recording — the clip is kept in memory and saved on stop regardless, and genuine out-of-space is still caught by the periodic storage check.
Stronger tap vibration on Android (the old pulses were too short to feel on many phones). Note: iPhone/iOS has no web vibration API, so haptics are Android-only.
The on-video timestamp now defaults to a 12-hour clock (AM/PM). You can switch it back to 24-hour in Camera Settings.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v195).

v194.intro: Build v194 — Covert Camera: reliable on-screen Recording / Stopped status.

sections.heading: Covert Camera
items: "● Recording" now stays on the black screen for the entire recording instead of flashing for about a second and disappearing. It's re-shown after the camera locks to landscape/fullscreen so the orientation step can't wipe it.
"Stopped" now shows every time you triple-tap to stop — including very short clips and the rare save-error case, where it previously showed nothing.
No change to recording, saving, timestamps, fail-safes or any other camera feature — this only fixes the status text.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v194).

v193.intro: Build v193 — Covert Camera: "How To Use" guide moved to its own page on the Camera tab.

sections.heading: Covert Camera
items: Added a "How To Use" item under Camera Settings on the Camera tab. It opens its own page (the same way the Clip Library does) with the controls and notes guide inside.
Removed the Help section from the Camera Settings screen so settings stay focused on options only.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v193).

v192.intro: Build v192 — Covert Camera: on-video timestamp, discreet access screen, silent-recording reminder.

sections.heading: Covert Camera
items: New Time & date stamp: turn it on in Camera Settings to burn the date and time into the recorded video (choose date format, 12/24-hour, top/bottom position and size). Off by default, so normal recording is unchanged.

When you upload a clip, a matching .txt sidecar with the exact recorded time and GPS coordinates is included so other software / an investigator can confirm when and where it was shot. Clip filenames now include the date, time and location.
The camera-access screen is now discreet (no red button) and has a Close button to instantly drop back to the Camera tab.

A clear Airplane mode reminder now sits right above the "Open Covert Camera" button (with how-to steps) so you can go fully silent before recording — a web app can't block calls/texts itself, so this prompts you to do it. The old, misleading in-app toggle was removed.
If you try to upload clips while still offline (e.g. Airplane mode left on), the app now warns you instead of failing silently.
You can now swipe up to peek at the live view while recording, then swipe down to go back to black — handy for a quick aim check without stopping the clip.

Crash-safe recording: video is now saved to the device every second as you record, so if the phone dies or the app is interrupted mid-clip, the footage is recovered automatically next time you open the app (instead of losing the whole clip).

Battery & storage fail-safes: you're warned at the start if battery or free space is low, and if either hits a critical level mid-recording the clip is auto-stopped and saved. Clips are also marked as persistent so the browser won't evict them when the device fills up. Camera Settings now shows free space. (Battery monitoring is Android-only — iPhone doesn't expose battery to web apps.)

The record-start haptic now fires the instant recording begins, instead of waiting for orientation/timestamp setup (haptics still require the Haptic feedback toggle under Personalization, and Android only — iPhone has no web vibration).

Smoother, sharper video: recording now asks the camera for a steady 30fps, uses a higher resolution-aware bitrate (up to ~12 Mbps) for clearer motion, and — when the timestamp overlay is on — redraws in sync with each camera frame to remove stutter.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v192).

v191.intro: Build v191 — Hotel Finder auto-retries Booking.com's intermittent failures.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Booking.com sometimes serves a page that can't be parsed (or ScraperAPI briefly 500s); the search now re-scrapes automatically (up to twice) and only shows an error if every attempt fails.
Retry is opt-in from the app and capped in the worker, so it can never loop or drain ScraperAPI credits.
Requires Cloudflare worker booking-worker-76. Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v191) + cloudflare/booking-worker.js.

v190.intro: Build v190 — Hotel Finder filter fix + optional ScraperAPI reliability lever.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: "Hotels & Motels only" no longer shows waterfront homes, cottages and other rentals: the filter stopped treating Booking.com's "/hotel/" link prefix as proof of a hotel and now reads the actual property name.
Same fix applied to the Cloudflare worker so both copies stay consistent (booking-worker-74).
New optional BOOKING_ULTRA_PREMIUM=1 Worker variable can reduce ScraperAPI HTTP 500s on Booking.com (uses more credits — off by default).
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v190). Deploy cloudflare/booking-worker.js to Cloudflare for the worker-side changes.

v189.intro: Build v189 — Critical fix: startup script no longer aborts before the update flow runs.

sections.heading: Software Update
items: Fixed a scope error (reverseGeocodeForClip referenced in the wrong script block) that threw on every launch and stopped the automatic update + notification flow from ever running.
All prior update reliability fixes now actually execute on startup.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v189).

v188.intro: Build v188 — Earliest-possible self-heal so updates can never get permanently stuck.

sections.heading: Software Update
